title: Bottleneck Adapters
code:
import numpy as np

def bottleneck_adapter(h, W_down, W_up):
    down = np.dot(h, W_down)
    activated = np.maximum(0.0, down)
    return h + np.dot(activated, W_up)

def run_practice():
    h = np.array([1.0, 1.0])
    W_down = np.zeros((2, 1))
    W_up = np.zeros((1, 2))
    out = bottleneck_adapter(h, W_down, W_up)
    assert np.allclose(out, h)
    print('[PASS] Bottleneck zero projection verified.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
